title: Arytera neoebudensis

The species is a type of tree that is known to thrive in tropical environments. Arytera neoebudensis is often found growing near coastal areas and is adapted to survive in salt-tolerant conditions. Arytera neoebudensis is endemic to the island of Vanikoro in the Pacific Ocean.
